title: (Cobblemon) Greninja Overhaul
description: Better Animations & Models for the Greninja Line!
body:
# Info
- **Adds Fully animated & remodeled greninja line!**
- **Also Added ASH-GRENINJA (requires mega showdown!)**
# IMPORTANT
**These Models are COMPLETELY recreated by the Official cobblemon modelers (credit to them!)**
